title: Forge from Vitor — bridge ProductRequirement → Forge engine

userStories.title: Parser §16 yaml block (markdown → structured stories)
userStories.description: Função parseStoriesYaml(markdown): { stories[], errors[] }. Localiza §16, extrai bloco yaml interno, parseia, retorna erros com line:col. Não valida semântica (VTF-002 faz).
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/spec/parse-prd-stories.ts exporta parseStoriesYaml(md: string)
Detecta §16 com regex matching '## §?16' ou '## Stories implementáveis' (case-insensitive)
Erros têm shape { line, col?, message }
Markdown sem §16 retorna stories: [], errors: [{line: 0, message: 'section §16 not found'}]
yaml malformado retorna errors com line do erro
Test: parse de docs/prd/backlog/prd-forge-engine.md retorna 14 stories, 0 errors
Test: markdown vazio retorna errors com 'no markdown content'

userStories.title: Validator de stories (regras AGENTS.md)
userStories.description: validateForgeStories(stories): { ok, errors[], warnings[] }. Errors fatais: id ausente/duplicado, verifiable vazio, deps inexistentes, ciclo no DAG. Warnings: estimate>30, <5 stories, >80% manual_browser, touches/agentProfile ausentes.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/spec/validate-stories.ts exporta validateForgeStories(stories)
Cycle detection via DFS: erro contém 'cycle: A → B → A'
Id duplicado: error com storyId + 'duplicate id'
verifiable vazio: error (não warning)
<5 stories: warning 'only N stories; AGENTS.md recommends ≥5'
>80% manual_browser: warning 'X of N stories verifiable is manual_browser only'
Test: stories do prd-forge-engine.md retornam ok=true, errors=[]
Test: stories com ciclo retornam ok=false, errors contém 'cycle'

userStories.title: DAL forge-bridge — emitToForge orchestrator
userStories.description: src/lib/dal/forge-bridge.ts: emitToForge(prdId, opts?). Pipeline: read PRD → assert approved → parseStoriesYaml → validate → slug derive → uniqueness check → specHash idempotency → merge passes:true do prd.json existente → write FS. dryRun pula write.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/dal/forge-bridge.ts exporta emitToForge
slugify('Forge Engine v2!') === 'forge-engine-v2'
Throws 'PRD not approved' se status='draft'
Slug conflito throws com suggestion '<slug>-2'
Re-emit com mesmo specHash: result.unchanged === true, FS intacto
Merge: passes:true de stories existentes mantém após re-emit
Stories removidas no v2 não aparecem no prd.json final
Stories novas no v2 aparecem com passes: false
Frontmatter do mirror md contém productRequirementId + version + specHash + emittedAt
dryRun=true: fs.existsSync(prdJsonPath) state inalterado

userStories.title: API routes — POST emit + GET preview
userStories.description: POST /api/forge/specs/from-prd/[prdId] (body Zod {slug?}) + GET /api/forge/specs/from-prd/[prdId]/preview (dryRun). Auth via proxy.ts; permissão can_edit_project OR is_manager. Erro mapping: 400 (Zod), 403 (perm), 404 (PRD), 409 (slug), 422 (not approved OR §16 invalid).
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/api/forge/specs/from-prd/[prdId]/route.ts exporta POST
src/app/api/forge/specs/from-prd/[prdId]/preview/route.ts exporta GET
POST body inválido → 400 + { error, issues[] }
POST com PRD não-approved → 422 + { error: 'PRD must be approved' }
POST sem permissão → 403
POST com slug em uso → 409 + { error, suggestion }
GET preview retorna stories + warnings sem efeitos colaterais
Schemas Zod em src/lib/forge/api-schemas.ts (importadas, não inline)

userStories.title: Vitor tool emit_to_forge + system prompt update
userStories.description: Tool emit_to_forge em src/lib/agent/agents/vitor/tools.ts com schema Zod { productRequirementId: uuid, slug?: string }. Implementação fetch interno. Vitor's prompt menciona emit_to_forge no pós-approve_prd flow. NÃO auto-chama — Vitor sugere, builder confirma.
acceptanceCriteria: buildVitorTools() retorna toolset incluindo emit_to_forge
Schema Zod valida productRequirementId como uuid
Tool description menciona pré-req status=approved
Erro 4xx mapeado pra { ok: false, error } (não throw raw)
Sucesso: { ok: true, prdJsonPath, storiesCount, warnings }
Vitor's system prompt menciona emit_to_forge no flow pós-approve_prd
Tool NÃO é chamada automaticamente

userStories.title: UI Forge Status card no PRD detail
userStories.description: src/components/prd/forge-status-card.tsx: 3 estados (não-emitido/emitido/erro). Preview via ResponsiveDialog. useOptimisticCollection pro state. Errors via Sonner toast. Integrar no PRD detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/prd/forge-status-card.tsx existe
Card só renderiza se prd.status === 'approved'
Preview modal usa ResponsiveDialog (não Dialog raw)
PreviewTable mostra id, title, estimateMinutes, verifiable kinds
Send com loading state durante POST
Errors via Sonner toast
Optimistic: clicar Send muda estado local-first; reconcilia após response
Re-emit: warning toast 'unchanged' se response.unchanged === true
Page PRD detail importa ForgeStatusCard e renderiza

userStories.title: CLI fallback + smoke E2E
userStories.description: scripts/forge/emit-from-prd.ts <prdId> [--slug=<x>] [--dry-run] [--json]: chama emitToForge diretamente. package.json script. Smoke E2E em test:bridge-e2e. Docs em forge-runbook.md.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/forge/emit-from-prd.ts compila + responde a --help
package.json adicionou script 'forge:emit-from-prd'
CLI --dry-run NÃO modifica filesystem
CLI --json output é JSON parseável
Smoke script:test:bridge-e2e roda + asserta prd.json shape
docs/runbooks/forge-runbook.md ganha seção 'Bridge from Vitor' (≥3 parágrafos)
